narrative:
North Royalton-05-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,033 registered voters, with 65.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
